03 = Caregiver(s) not likely to provide assistance

M2110_ADL_IADL_ASTNC_FREQ M2110 Frequency of ADL or IADL Assistance From Caregiver This field indicates how often the patient receives ADL or IADL assistance from any caregiver(s). 01 = At least daily
02 = Three or more times per week
03 = One to two times per week
04 = Received, but less often than
